Congratulations on reaching a quarter of a million, if any youtube channel deserves it, yours does. It is sad that youtube don't differentiate between the content of channels. To  get a million on an alternative tech channel would be rare, if not unique. 
    Interesting you say "all you guys who are members" and glancing at the names, guess what, they do seem to be all guys. These guys are probably having to sneak out in the night to do their experiments so as to avoid the wrath of the "other half"!

author: @actudoran
text:
well done mate!

hmmm as far as an ideea ... MYT engine as a two part striling engine ...  one side always cold and another always hot ... 
should be effective :)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: should be and nice suggestion. cheers mate

replies.author: @actudoran
replies.text:
@ThinkingandTinkering it's been one of my fantasies to be able to print such an engine and use it as a LTD Stirling with a mix of off-the-shelf parts and prints so as to build it and fill it with buthane gas or CO2 ... I know the ideal gas would be hydrogen but good luck keeping it inside .... helium is second best but much the same problem albeit a few orders of magnitude lower... 
lighter gas is ok, CO2 is just much safer ... acetone melts the prints otherwise would be cool since it boils at 35c and has a pretty big coefficient of expansion... 

can't wait to have a good 3d printer and a laser cutter ... 

I've seen a few STL files for the MYT engine so should be doable sans much mucking around the design phase ... I mean adjusting the tolerance to make it work sans sticky points and such ...

Congratulations. It needs to be said that the only way to build a channel this big is to avoid politics. Not that this channel Should talk about politics.
